entities.name: SOIL TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: The total amount of nitrogen present in the soil, used as a key nutrient indicator for soil management.

entities.name: DIGITAL SOIL MAPPING
entities.description: A technique used to create spatial distributions of soil properties using numerical models.

entities.name: SOUTH INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study was conducted.

entities.name: KOTHAPALLY
entities.description: One of the smallholder villages in South India used as a study area.

entities.name: MASUTI
entities.description: One of the smallholder villages in South India used as a study area.

entities.name: REGRESSION KRIGING
entities.description: A spatial interpolation method that combines regression with kriging to predict soil properties.

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: The process of detecting and monitoring the physical characteristics of an area from a distance, typically using satellite imagery.

entities.name: SPECTRAL INDICES
entities.description: Mathematical combinations of different spectral bands used to highlight specific features of the land surface.

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The water content of the soil, which can influence the conservation of soil nitrogen.

entities.name: VEGETATION
entities.description: Plant life in the study areas that contributes to the conservation of soil nitrogen.

entities.name: SOIL CRUSTS
entities.description: The thin, hardened layer on the soil surface that can contribute to the conservation of soil nitrogen.

entities.name: RAPIDEYE
entities.description: A satellite sensor providing 5m spatial resolution imagery for soil nitrogen prediction.

entities.name: LANDSAT 8
entities.description: A satellite sensor providing 30m spatial resolution imagery for soil nitrogen prediction.

entities.name: WORLDVIEW-2
entities.description: A high-resolution satellite sensor providing 2m spatial resolution imagery and specific spectral bands.

entities.name: GEOEYE-1
entities.description: A high-resolution satellite sensor providing 2m spatial resolution imagery for soil nitrogen prediction.

entities.name: PLEIADES-1A
entities.description: A high-resolution satellite sensor providing 2m spatial resolution imagery for soil nitrogen prediction.

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARM SETTINGS
entities.description: Agricultural environments characterized by small-scale farming operations.
